data.title: onboarding SKILL.md: Step 0 brew example inconsistent with Phase 9 pip3-first install logic
data.description:
## Incident Overview
Source: code review (passed) — minor finding not addressed in this session.
Finding: The Step 0 optional-tools installation example only shows 'brew install ast-grep semgrep', but the Phase 9 Semgrep installation block correctly checks pip3 first, then brew. This creates a subtle inconsistency: a reader of Step 0 might expect brew to be the sole install path, while Phase 9 uses pip3 as the preferred path. Aligning the Step 0 example to match the actual pip3-first logic in Phase 9 would improve clarity.
File: plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md
Category: maintainability
